headline: Cummins (CMI) Stock Looks Reasonably Priced After Its 207% Five Year Run
summary: Cummins stock has returned 206.5% over the past five years. With the latest Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate indicating the shares are now fairly valued, the question is whether recent gains leave enough valuation upside from here. A 206.5% total return over five years suggests long term holders in Cummins have already captured a substantial re-rating, so fresh buyers need to think carefully about what is now priced in. Stronger earnings expectations and income appeal can...
